config.title: Instytucja #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'std_choice_list_hli #include "50200" 'section_fclose #include "50222"
'create_address #include "50111"
function fopen:fopen = std_fopen() section_fopen THIS_FILE end function
function fsave dim bSave: bSave=std_fsave() if not bSave then section_fsave THIS_FILE end if end function
function fclose section_fclose THIS_FILE end function
#ifdef APPCONFIG_ADDRESSES_BY_ZIP QXR_GET_ADDRESSES_BY_ZIP() #endif

page.body:
XFBEGIN
XFPSEUDOSECBEG(30,NAPIS_URZAD,2)
QXX_NAZWA_SKROT
XFREQREF(Typ instytucji,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5TYPINSTYTUCJI,40,pTyp,strNazwa,1) #ifdef _AMPLUS XFOPTEDITFIELD(Kod izby celnej,20,strTel3) #endif XFOPTEDITFIELD(Kod urzędu skarbowego,10,strTel2)
XFSECEND
QXX_ADRES(6,,Adres) #ifdef _AMPLUS QXS_BEGIN_REQ(13,NAPIS_ATF,2) XFTEL1 XFFAX XFOPTEMAIL(E-mail,strEmail) XFOPTWWW(WWW,strWWW) XFSECEND #else QXS_BEGIN_REQ(13,NAPIS_ATF,2) XFTEL1 XFOPTEDITFIELD(Telefon 2,20,strTel3) XFFAX XFOPTEMAIL(E-mail,strEmail) XFOPTWWW(WWW,strWWW) XFSECEND #endif XFBLOCK_RACHBANK(21) XFEND
